name: coTfsSDOBlockUploadSegmentResponse
title: coTfsSDOBlockUploadSegmentResponse
syntax: long coTfsSDOBlockUploadSegmentResponse( dword ccs, dword cs, dword ackSeq, dword blkSize, dword expMsgNumber, dword startSeqNumber );
description: This function waits for a SDO segmented upload request and sends the corresponding response. Before the call of this function, no time-delay functions should be inserted in order to prevent a loss of the request message.

parameters.name: ackSeq
parameters.description: Sequence number of the message that should be confirmed.

parameters.name: expMsgNumber
parameters.description: Number of requests awaited (generally corresponds to the value ackSeq), deviations can be used in order to provoke protocol violations.

parameters.name: startSeqNumber
parameters.description: SDO block number of the first block expected.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
